title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses why he started a new company after already building a unicorn. His approach emphasizes focus and avoiding crowded markets rather than pursuing larger models or better fundraising, building Glean to a $7 billion valuation in two years of stealth mode.
